nasb.text: Therefore Pilate entered again into the Praetorium, and summoned Jesus and said to Him, “Are You the King of the Jews?”

esv.text: So Pilate entered his headquarters again and called Jesus and said to him, “Are you the King of the Jews?”

cnv.text: 彼拉多又進了官邸，把耶穌叫來，問他說：“你是猶太人的王嗎？”

ccb.text: 彼拉多回到总督府提审耶稣，问道：“你是犹太人的王吗？”

csbs.text: 彼拉多又进了总督府，把耶稣叫来，问他：“你是犹太人的王吗？”
